subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out — we'd love to explore a collaboration between our teams!

I'm available for a call on any of the following dates and times:
- Monday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Tuesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Wednesday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which slot works best on your end, and I'll send a calendar invite accordingly.

Regarding your request for our internal contact directory and direct phone lines for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to share that information. I'm happy to be your primary point of contact to help facilitate the right introductions from our side.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best,
Assistant
